HERO.TITLE: Get More Customers on Airbnb and Booking With Photos That Convert
HERO.INTRO: I help accommodation owners increase clicks, trust, and bookings with conversion-focused photography made specifically for Airbnb and Booking listings.

SERVICE_POINTS.ITEM_1: Airbnb and Booking-optimized photo direction that improves listing performance
SERVICE_POINTS.ITEM_2: Composition and styling built to attract more customers and increase conversions
SERVICE_POINTS.ITEM_3: Fast delivery with web-ready exports and thumbnail-friendly crops

WORKFLOW.HEADING: How We Work
WORKFLOW.STEP_1_TEXT: We align your audience, room mix, and unique selling points.
WORKFLOW.STEP_2_TEXT: Structured room-by-room coverage with angles that sell experience.
WORKFLOW.STEP_3_TEXT: Color-consistent retouching and optimized files ready for publishing.

OWNER_ADVANTAGE.HEADING: Why We Need 3 Days On-Site and Why You Only Win
OWNER_ADVANTAGE.INTRO: To photograph the full accommodation professionally, we need access to one room for 3 days. This gives us time to capture every angle, every lighting condition, and every detail across the property so your listing looks complete and premium.
OWNER_ADVANTAGE.BULLET_1: Complete visual coverage of all rooms and guest areas.
OWNER_ADVANTAGE.BULLET_2: Stronger listing quality that builds trust and increases clicks.
OWNER_ADVANTAGE.BULLET_3: Higher booking potential and better pricing confidence.
OWNER_ADVANTAGE.BULLET_4: A long-term photo library you can reuse across all channels.
OWNER_ADVANTAGE.CLOSE: In short: the 3-day window helps us create photos that keep working for your business long after the shoot is done.

PORTFOLIO.HEADING: Recent Accommodation Photos
PORTFOLIO.SUB: Real frames from your provided property set, presented as listing-ready visual storytelling.

PACKAGES.HEADING: Packages for Every Property Size
PACKAGES.SUB: Simple, transparent options to match your accommodation goals and booking timeline.

STARTER.NOTE: Ideal for studios and small guesthouses

CONTACT.HEADING: Ready to Upgrade Your Listing Visuals?
CONTACT.INTRO: Send your location, property type, and preferred schedule. I will reply with a tailored photography proposal for your accommodation.
